mnemonics: Greedy Bandits Regret Not Exploring (Greedy Bandits = algorithm name, Regret = core metric, Explore = key action)
keyPoints: The algorithm must balance exploration (trying new options) and exploitation (choosing the best-known option)
Regret is the performance metric, measuring the difference between your choices and the optimal choice
It's a solution for the explore/exploit dilemma in scenarios with incomplete information
commonMistakes: Focusing only on exploitation (greedy approach) and missing a potentially better, unexplored arm
Using it for A/B testing when you need rigorous statistical significance rather than cumulative reward
